_meta.source: Google GPS Measurement Tools / Android Bootcamp (reference: gnss_analysis_original_reference.ipynb v2026.01.29)

operators.>=: measured value must be >= threshold to PASS
operators.<=: measured value must be <= threshold to PASS
operators.==: measured value must equal threshold to PASS

cn0_top4.name: Avg CN0 Top 4 Per Epoch
cn0_top4.description: Average CN0 of the top 4 signals per epoch

max_epoch_gap.name: Max Time Between Epochs
max_epoch_gap.description: Maximum gap between consecutive measurement epochs

avg_gps_l1.name: Avg Valid Per Epoch (GPS_L1)
avg_gps_l1.description: Average number of valid GPS L1 signals per epoch

avg_gps_l5.name: Avg Valid Per Epoch (GPS_L5)
avg_gps_l5.description: Average number of valid GPS L5 signals per epoch

avg_glo_g1.name: Avg Valid Per Epoch (GLO_G1)
avg_glo_g1.description: Average number of valid GLONASS G1 signals per epoch

avg_gal_e1.name: Avg Valid Per Epoch (GAL_E1)
avg_gal_e1.description: Average number of valid Galileo E1 signals per epoch

avg_gal_e5a.name: Avg Valid Per Epoch (GAL_E5A)
avg_gal_e5a.description: Average number of valid Galileo E5A signals per epoch

avg_gal_e5b.name: Avg Valid Per Epoch (GAL_E5B)
avg_gal_e5b.description: Average number of valid Galileo E5B signals per epoch

avg_bds_b1i.name: Avg Valid Per Epoch (BDS_B1I)
avg_bds_b1i.description: Average number of valid BeiDou B1I signals per epoch

avg_bds_b2a.name: Avg Valid Per Epoch (BDS_B2A)
avg_bds_b2a.description: Average number of valid BeiDou B2A signals per epoch

avg_bds_b1c.name: Avg Valid Per Epoch (BDS_B1C)
avg_bds_b1c.description: Average number of valid BeiDou B1C signals per epoch

req_sig_types.name: Required Sig Types
req_sig_types.description: Each required signal type (GPS L1+L5, GAL E1+E5A+E5B, BDS B1I+B2A+B1C, GLO G1) must average >= 1 per epoch. PASS if missing_types list is empty.

usable_pct.name: Measurement State Usable
usable_pct.description: Percentage of raw measurements with STATE_TOW_DECODED or STATE_TOW_KNOWN set

dup_signals.name: Duplicate Signals
dup_signals.description: Number of duplicate (same SVid + frequency) signals in a single epoch

large_jumps.name: Time Tag Large Jumps
large_jumps.description: Number of gaps > 2000 ms between consecutive epochs

jitter_std_ms.name: Time Tag Jitter
jitter_std_ms.description: Standard deviation of inter-epoch time differences

timesync_max_ms.name: Time-sync Max Jitter
timesync_max_ms.description: Maximum deviation of hardware clock sync from nominal 1-second intervals

timesync_std_ms.name: Time-sync Jitter
timesync_std_ms.description: Standard deviation of hardware clock sync jitter across all epochs

elapsed_range_ms.name: Delta ElapsedRealtimeNanos Range
elapsed_range_ms.description: Range (max - min) of delta-ElapsedRealtimeNanos across epochs

elapsed_std_ms.name: Delta ElapsedRealtimeNanos Std
elapsed_std_ms.description: Standard deviation of delta-ElapsedRealtimeNanos across epochs

clkbias_mps_std.name: Delta Clock Bias MPS Std
clkbias_mps_std.description: Standard deviation of receiver clock bias drift (metres per second)

ls_pr_res_std_m.name: LS-Freq PR Residuals Std
ls_pr_res_std_m.description: Standard deviation of L1 pseudorange residuals from a least-squares clock-only fit

pct_valid_adr.name: Percent Valid ADR
pct_valid_adr.description: Percentage of measurements with ADR_STATE_VALID set (bit 0 of AccumulatedDeltaRangeState)

pct_usable_adr.name: Percent Usable ADR
pct_usable_adr.description: Percentage of measurements with ADR valid and not reset or cycle-slipped

adr_var_cyc.name: ADR Variability
adr_var_cyc.description: Median absolute deviation of ADR residuals across satellites within an epoch

prr_dadr_med.name: Median (PRR - Delta(ADR))
prr_dadr_med.description: Median of the difference between pseudorange rate and delta-ADR (should be ~0)

prr_dadr_std.name: Std (PRR - Delta(ADR))
prr_dadr_std.description: Standard deviation of (PRR - delta-ADR); measures consistency between Doppler and phase

l1_dpr_dadr.name: L1freq (Delta(PR) - Delta(ADR))
l1_dpr_dadr.description: Median absolute deviation of L1 delta-pseudorange minus delta-ADR across epochs

l5_dpr_dadr.name: L5freq (Delta(PR) - Delta(ADR))
l5_dpr_dadr.description: Median absolute deviation of L5 delta-pseudorange minus delta-ADR across epochs

l1_pr_res_std_m.name: L1-Freq PR Residuals Std
l1_pr_res_std_m.description: Standard deviation of L1 pseudorange residuals after clock estimation (center 94% of data)

l5_pr_res_std_m.name: L5-Freq PR Residuals Std
l5_pr_res_std_m.description: Standard deviation of L5 pseudorange residuals after clock estimation (center 94% of data)

l1_norm_rms.name: L1-Freq Median Normalized PR Residual RMS
l1_norm_rms.description: RMS of L1 PR residuals normalized by the reported pseudorange uncertainty; should be ~1.0 if uncertainties are well-calibrated

l5_norm_rms.name: L5-Freq Median Normalized PR Residual RMS
l5_norm_rms.description: RMS of L5 PR residuals normalized by the reported pseudorange uncertainty

pct_pr_outliers.name: Percent PR Residuals Outliers
pct_pr_outliers.description: Percentage of L1 pseudorange residuals exceeding 3-sigma of the per-epoch residual distribution

n_adr_epochs.name: Num Epochs for ADR Residual Analysis
n_adr_epochs.description: Minimum number of epochs with enough valid ADR to compute ADR residuals

adr_res_std_cyc.name: ADR Residuals Std
adr_res_std_cyc.description: Standard deviation of carrier-phase (ADR) residuals after clock and geometry removal (reference: 0.015 m at L1 = ~0.079 cycles)

norm_adr_rms.name: Median Normalized ADR Residual RMS
norm_adr_rms.description: RMS of ADR residuals normalized by the reported ADR uncertainty

pct_high_adr_ep.name: Percent Epochs with High ADR Residuals
pct_high_adr_ep.description: Percentage of epochs where the ADR residual RMS exceeds 3× the median

prr_res_std_mps.name: PRR Residuals Std
prr_res_std_mps.description: Standard deviation of pseudorange-rate (Doppler) residuals after velocity estimation (center 94% of data)

pct_high_prr_ep.name: Percent Epochs with High PRR Residuals
pct_high_prr_ep.description: Percentage of epochs where PRR residual RMS exceeds 3× the median

norm_prr_rms.name: Median Normalized PRR Residual RMS
norm_prr_rms.description: RMS of PRR residuals normalized by the reported PRR uncertainty; 1.0 = perfectly calibrated
